insights.description: Size bias detected: larger positions (>1.5x) have 40% WR vs 60% for smaller positions. Avg PnL: $-0.52 vs $-0.31
insights.actionable_suggestion: Reduce position sizes — larger positions are losing more often. Consider capping leverage or adding a size penalty to the confidence calculation.

insights.description: Time-of-day edge: 'morning' (6:00-12:00 UTC) wins 67% vs 'evening' at 50% (spread: 17%)
insights.actionable_suggestion: Boost confidence for trades during morning (6:00-12:00 UTC). Consider raising confidence floor during evening by 5-10%.
